unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: source_context_too_large_for_adapter_conversion
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: The source test context exceeds the configured per-case budget and is not sent to the LLM. source_context_chars=27740, limit=20000, reason=full_test_definition_exceeds_limit.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object/array element access (Index trait not in allowed UUIDs) necessary to verify null placeholders and array indices.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test checks root["a"] and arrGetAnd(index). Allowed target APIs do not include indexing methods for JsonValue or Object. Cannot replicate assertions without indexing.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access (root.get(key, default) not available; Index trait not allowed).
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test uses root.get("15", false) and similar. No equivalent method in allowed target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access and string extraction via root["a"].asString().
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test uses root["a"].asString() and root.get. Neither are available with allowed target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access (root.get and root["a"]) needed to verify special float values in object context.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test checks root["a"].asDouble(), root.get("b",0.0), etc. Allowed target APIs lack indexing to access these fields.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access (root.get and root["a"].asString()); also test uses allowSingleQuotes setting which has no target equivalent.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test code identical to allowSingleQuotes case, same API limitations apply.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for array element access (root[1u]) required to verify parsed value.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test checks root[1u] == "value". No array indexing method in allowed target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Missing target API for object field access (root["property"]) required to verify parsed value.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test checks root["property"] == "value". No object indexing in allowed target APIs.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Cannot replicate source assertion root.asInt() after failed parse because target parse returns Err with no value on failure, and as_i64 cannot be called.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source expects parse to fail but still provide root with int value 1. Target API does not support extracting value from error.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target does not support CharReaderBuilder settings (failIfExtra, strictMode). The source test sets multiple settings that produce different parse outcomes for the same document, which cannot be replicated in the target where parse has a single behavior.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: The source test has four blocks with different settings; the target has no equivalent settings API. Cannot deterministically replay observable behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: No observable behavior for aligned source function size in the test; the test only calls a non-aligned fuzz function.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: The source test does not contain any assertion or usage of the aligned source function size. The only assertion is on the return value of LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput, which is not aligned. Cannot derive expected behavior for size.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target array iteration does not expose key/name/index.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test accesses key(), name(), index() on an array iterator. Rust members_mut on array yields only values, without key information. These methods are not available in the target API.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target object iteration does not expose key/name/memberName.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test accesses key(), name(), memberName() on an object iterator. Rust members on object yields only values, without key information. These methods are not available in the target API.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target parse function does not return structured errors with offsets and messages; cannot replay structured error verification.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: The source test expects parse failure with specific offset_start=2, offset_limit=3, message='Missing ' or object member name'. The target crate's parse() returns Result<JsonValue> with limited error variants (e.g., UnexpectedCharacter) and no position information. Cannot replicate the structured error assertion.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target does not provide equivalent array insertion and indexing APIs to replay the observed behavior; aligned source function (Value constructor) alone is insufficient to replicate the test's observable behavior.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test heavily uses array.insert, operator[], front, back, and address comparisons. Target lacks IndexMut for arrays, no insert function, and no front/back methods within the allowed API set. A meaningful replay cannot be constructed.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Target does not provide array index access or mutable index assignment needed to replicate the test's observable behavior; aligned APIs are insufficient.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test uses array element access via operator[] (const and non-const), front(), back(), and removal. Target lacks Index/IndexMut for arrays, and front/back methods. The aligned APIs (Value constructor, type predicates, removeIndex) cannot reproduce the element access and modification checks.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source function (Value constructor) is not used in the test; the test uses copy construction and comparison predicates that cannot be mapped to the aligned target API.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test creates arrays via append and then compares using checkIsLess/checkIsEqual. The aligned function is Value(const char*) which is not used. No target equivalent for copy construction or comparison exist in the allowed set.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source function (Value constructor) does not match the test usage; test uses default constructor and nullSingleton, not string constructor.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: The aligned source function is Value(const char*), but the test uses Value() (default) and Json::Value::nullSingleton(). No target equivalent for default construction or null singleton is available in the aligned functions.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: Aligned source function (Value constructor) does not match the test usage; test creates objects via bracket assignment and compares using checkIsLess/checkIsEqual.
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: The aligned source function is Value(const char*), but the test uses operator[] to build objects. No target equivalents for object construction via indexing or comparison are available in the allowed set.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: target lacks ordering comparison functions to replicate checkIsLess semantics
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test requires operator< for Json::Value of different types, which has no direct target equivalent (PartialOrd not implemented). Aligned source function only covers constructor; cannot reproduce observable ordering behavior.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: target does not expose array indexing or get methods required for element access
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test copies/moves array and accesses elements via operator[]. Target lacks public array indexing (Index<usize>) and get() in allowed APIs. Cannot replay element assertions.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: aligned source functions do not match the test's numeric usage
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Aligned source functions include only the string constructor and is* methods, but source test primarily uses double constructor (not aligned) and as*/isConvertibleTo APIs not in aligned set. Cannot construct a meaningful test upholding source-grounded expectations.

unresolved_behavior_cases.reason: target lacks configurable precision in stringify
unresolved_behavior_cases.details: Source test uses StreamWriterBuilder with precision settings. Target stringify uses fixed dump format with no exposed precision controls. Cannot reproduce the precision-specific expected strings.

_behavior_case_coverage.event_source_case_id_policy: Only explicit replay_events[].source_case_ids count as behavior-case replay coverage. Function-name fallback is intentionally not used because one function can have many source test behavior variants.
